tasks.rawMessage: Delegate to Rex: review the ClawPowers-Skills repo, run the validator agent, and report status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion report in reports/.
tasks.encoded: ITP:DL Rex: RV the CPS repo, run the validator agent, and RP status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion RP in reports/.

tasks.rawMessage: Execute: deploy ClawPowers-Skills v2.2.0 to npm, then update ClawPowers-Agent dependency to 2.2.0, then publish ClawPowers-Agent v1.1.0.
tasks.encoded: ITP:EX: DP CPS v2.2.0 to NM, then UP CPA dependency to 2.2.0, then publish CPA v1.1.0.

tasks.rawMessage: Status report to Max: AlphaWolf orchestrator up and healthy, AlphaWolf trend-watcher up, AlphaWolf ready-trader up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.
tasks.encoded: ITP:ST to Max: AW-O up and healthy, AW-TW up, AW-RT up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.

tasks.rawMessage: Execute: monitor btc-perp-trader, check trading status, fix any unhealthy containers, and report status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.
tasks.encoded: ITP:EX: MN BPT, CK trading status, FX any unhealthy containers, and RP status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.

tasks.rawMessage: Rex, please execute the audit on wallet module, fix the high severity findings, and merge the PR. Priority P1. Status report when done.
tasks.encoded: ITP:Rex, please EX the AU on AW, FX the high severity findings, and MG the PR. Priority P1. ST when done.

notes: ITP encode path, server health, codebook metadata, and encode latency are live measurements against the running server.
Prompt caching economics are modeled using Anthropic cache-write (1.25x) and cache-read (0.10x) input pricing multipliers.
Token counts are estimated as ceil(chars/4), matching the existing ITP benchmark convention. Output tokens are excluded.
